Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***********************************************************************

 The bicategory of monads and lax morphisms

 We define the bicategory of monads and lax morphisms.

 Note: this is a different bicategory from the one defined in Monads.v.
 The bicategory defined in that file has 1-cells that preserve the unit
 and multiplication up to invertible 2-cell. The formal theory of monads
 as described by Street, makes use of the bicategory defined in this
 file.

 Contents
 1. The bicategory
 2. The univalence
 3. Projections and constructions
 4. Invertible 2-cells
 5. Equivalences of monads
 6. Underlying pseudofunctor

 ***********************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Prod.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.FullSub.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Sigma.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.EndoMap.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Monad.
  Context (B : bicat).

  (**
   1. The bicategory
   *)
  
B: bicat
disp_cat_ob_mor (end_bicat B)

  
B: bicat
disp_cat_ob_mor (end_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
end_bicat B → UU
B: bicat
∏ x y : end_bicat B,
?obd x → ?obd y → end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
B: bicat
end_bicat B → UU
 exact (λ mx, id₁ _ ==> pr2 mx).
    
B: bicat
∏ x y : end_bicat B,
(λ mx : end_bicat B, id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx) x
→ (λ mx : end_bicat B, id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx) y
  → end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact (λ mx my ηx ηy f,
             linvunitor _ • (ηx ▹ (pr1 f))
             =
             rinvunitor _ • (pr1 f ◃ ηy) • pr2 f).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
disp_cat_id_comp (end_bicat B)
  disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor

  
B: bicat
disp_cat_id_comp (end_bicat B)
  disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor

    
B: bicat
∏ (x : end_bicat B) (xx : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : end_bicat B) (f : end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : end_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
B: bicat
∏ (x : end_bicat B) (xx : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
(rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ ηx))
• (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
• ((id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ ηx)
   • (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx)))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
• ((id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ ηx)
   • (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx)))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
(id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ ηx)
• (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
((id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ ηx) • lunitor (pr2 mx))
• rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
(lunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • ηx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
lunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
lunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
   • id₂ (id₁ (pr1 mx)) ⋆⋆ ηx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
lunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
runitor (id₁ (pr1 mx))
• (rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
(runitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) =
id₂ (id₁ (pr1 mx) · id₁ (pr1 mx))
• (ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx) = ηx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : end_bicat B) (f : end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : end_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_add_unit_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
linvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
• ((((rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
      • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
     • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
    • (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
((linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
 • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g))
• (ηx ▹ pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
• ((((rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
      • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
     • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
    • (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
   • (ηx ▹ pr1 f · pr1 g)) =
rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)
• ((pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz)
   • (rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
      • ((pr1 f ◃ pr2 g)
         • (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g)
            • ((pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)
               • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (((ηx ▹ pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) =
rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)
• ((pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz)
   • (rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
      • ((pr1 f ◃ pr2 g)
         • (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g)
            • ((pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)
               • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
((linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((ηx ▹ pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g) =
(((((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
    • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
   • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
  • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(linvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((ηx ▹ pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) =
((((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz

(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f)) ▹ pr1 g =
((((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
((rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f) ▹ pr1 g =
((((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
((rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr1 f ◃ ηy) ▹ pr1 g))
• (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g) =
((((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f ▹ pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr1 f ◃ ηy) ▹ pr1 g) =
(((rinvunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
  • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
 • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
• lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr1 f ◃ ηy) ▹ pr1 g) =
(((((pr1 f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 g))
    • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 mz)))
   • (pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz))
  • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz))
 • (pr1 f ◃ pr2 g))
• lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr1 f ◃ ηy) ▹ pr1 g) =
(pr1 f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 g))
• (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 mz))
   • ((pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz)
      • (rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
         • ((pr1 f ◃ pr2 g)
            • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g)))))

f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f

ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
(pr1 f ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 g))

   • ((pr1 f · pr1 g ◃ ηz)
      • (rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr2 mz)
         • ((pr1 f ◃ pr2 g)
            • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr2 my) (pr1 g))))) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr1 f ◃ ηy) ▹ pr1 g)

ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
linvunitor (pr1 g) ⋆⋆ id₂ (pr1 f)
• lassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 my)) (pr1 g) =
rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
id₂ (pr1 g) ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (pr1 f) =
rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
ηx: id₁ (pr1 mx) ==> pr2 mx
ηy: id₁ (pr1 my) ==> pr2 my
ηz: id₁ (pr1 mz) ==> pr2 mz
ηf: linvunitor (pr1 f) • (ηx ▹ pr1 f) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) • (pr1 f ◃ ηy)) • pr2 f
ηg: linvunitor (pr1 g) • (ηy ▹ pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 g) • (pr1 g ◃ ηz)) • pr2 g
rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g =
rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
ex: end_bicat B
ef, eg: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_add_unit_cat_data ex
pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
ef = eg

      
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
ex: end_bicat B
ef, eg: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_add_unit_cat_data ex
pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr1 (id₁ ex) ==> pr2 ex · id₁ (pr1 ex),
   (runitor (pr1 (id₁ ex)) • z) • runitor (pr2 ex))
  (pr1 pq): (λ z : pr1 (id₁ ex) ==> pr2 ex · id₁ (pr1 ex),
 (runitor (pr1 (id₁ ex)) • z) • runitor (pr2 ex))
  (linvunitor (pr1 (id₁ ex)) • (ef ▹ pr1 (id₁ ex))) =
(λ z : pr1 (id₁ ex) ==> pr2 ex · id₁ (pr1 ex),
 (runitor (pr1 (id₁ ex)) • z) • runitor (pr2 ex))
  ((rinvunitor (pr1 (id₁ ex))
    • (pr1 (id₁ ex) ◃ eg)) • pr2 (id₁ ex))
ef = eg

      
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
ex: end_bicat B
ef, eg: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_add_unit_cat_data ex
pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : id₁ (pr1 ex) ==> pr2 ex · id₁ (pr1 ex),
   (runitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • z) • runitor (pr2 ex))
  (pr1 pq): (runitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
 • (linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
    • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex)))) • runitor (pr2 ex) =
(runitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
 • ((rinvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
     • (id₁ (pr1 ex) ◃ eg))
    • (lunitor (pr2 ex) • rinvunitor (pr2 ex))))
• runitor (pr2 ex)
ef = eg

q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : id₁ (pr1 ex) · id₁ (pr1 ex) ==> pr2 ex,
   linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • z) p: (λ z : id₁ (pr1 ex) · id₁ (pr1 ex) ==> pr2 ex,
 linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • z)

p: lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • ef =
lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • eg
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : id₁ (pr1 ex) · id₁ (pr1 ex) ==> pr2 ex,
   linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • z) p: linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
• (lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • ef) =
linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex))
• (lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • eg)
ef = eg

pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
p: lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • ef =
lunitor (id₁ (pr1 ex)) • eg
q: ef = eg
ef = eg

      exact q.

B: bicat
disp_cat_ob_mor (end_bicat B)

  
B: bicat
disp_cat_ob_mor (end_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
end_bicat B → UU
B: bicat
∏ x y : end_bicat B,
?obd x → ?obd y → end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
B: bicat
end_bicat B → UU
 exact (λ mx, pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx).
    
B: bicat
∏ x y : end_bicat B,
(λ mx : end_bicat B, pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx) x
→ (λ mx : end_bicat B, pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx) y
  → end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact (λ mx my μx μy f,
             lassociator _ _ _
             • (pr2 f ▹ _)
             • rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ pr2 f)
             • lassociator _ _ _
             • (μx ▹ _)
             =
             (_ ◃ μy)
             • pr2 f).
  Defined.

xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : end_bicat B) (f : end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : end_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
B: bicat
∏ (x : end_bicat B) (xx : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
((((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
    • ((lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))
       ▹ pr2 mx))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
(id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ μx)
• (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
((((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
    • ((lunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)
       • (rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx))
  • ((pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx))
     • (pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx))))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
(id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ μx)
• (lunitor (pr2 mx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
((((((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
      • (lunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx))
     • (rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx))
    • rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
((id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ μx) • lunitor (pr2 mx))
• rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
(((((lunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx)
     • (rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx))
    • rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
((id₁ (pr1 mx) ◃ μx) • lunitor (pr2 mx))
• rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
(((((lunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx)
     • (rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx))
    • rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)))
• (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)) =
(lunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx) • μx) • rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
lunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx)
• ((rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx))
         • ((pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx))
            • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                 (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx))))))) =
lunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx) • (μx • rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
(rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)
• (rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx)
   • ((pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx))
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx))
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)))))) =
μx • rinvunitor (pr2 mx)

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
(rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)
• (rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx)
   • ((pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx))
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx))
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)))))) =
rinvunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx)
• id₂ (id₁ (pr1 mx)) ⋆⋆ μx

      
B: bicat
mx: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
(rinvunitor (pr2 mx) ▹ pr2 mx)
• (rassociator (pr2 mx) (id₁ (pr1 mx)) (pr2 mx)
   • ((pr2 mx ◃ lunitor (pr2 mx))
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 mx))

              (id₁ (pr1 mx)) • (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx)))))) =
rinvunitor (pr2 mx · pr2 mx) • (μx ▹ id₁ (pr1 mx))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (x y z : end_bicat B) (f : end_bicat B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : end_bicat B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : disp_add_mu_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: ((((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
    • (pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf) = (pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
μg: ((((lassociator (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
    • (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz))
   • rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
 • lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
• (μy ▹ pr1 mg) = (pr1 mg ◃ μz) • pr2 mg
((((lassociator (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
    • (((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
           • (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
          • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
        • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
       ▹ pr2 mz))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr2 mx
     ◃ ((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
           • (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
          • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
        • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) =
(pr1 mf · pr1 mg ◃ μz)
• ((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
      • (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
     • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
    • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: ((((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
    • (pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf) = (pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
μg: ((((lassociator (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
    • (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz))
   • rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
  • (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
 • lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
• (μy ▹ pr1 mg) = (pr1 mg ◃ μz) • pr2 mg
((((lassociator (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
    • (((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
           ▹ pr2 mz) • ((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz))
         • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
            ▹ pr2 mz)) • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz))
       • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
          ▹ pr2 mz)))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
  • (((((pr2 mx
         ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
        • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg)))
       • (pr2 mx
          ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
      • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)))
     • (pr2 mx
        ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) =
(pr1 mf · pr1 mg ◃ μz)
• ((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
      • (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
     • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
    • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))

μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my

((((((((((((lassociator ... ... ... • (...))

             ▹ pr2 mz)) • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz))

           ▹ pr2 mz))

           (pr2 mz))

• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) =
(((((pr1 mf · pr1 mg ◃ μz)

   • (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
  • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
 • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)

                              • ((pr2 mx
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz · pr2 mz)

         • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
            • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)))))

  • (pr2 mx ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((((((((((((id₂ ... ▹ pr2 mz) • ((...) ▹ pr2 mz))
          • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
             ▹ pr2 mz)) • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz))
        • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
           ▹ pr2 mz))
       • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
           (pr2 mz))
      • (pr2 mx
         ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)))
     • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg)))
    • (pr2 mx ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) = ?t2

mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,

      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =

B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
      • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
          ▹ pr2 mz)
         • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
              (pr2 mz)
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
                    (pr2 mz))
               • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                          (pr1 mg))
                     • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                        • ((pr2 mx
                            ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx)
                                (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
                           • (lassociator (pr2 mx)
                                (pr2 mx)
                                (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                              • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
(pr1 mf ◃ lassociator (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz))
• (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
   • (((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
      • ((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
          ▹ pr2 mz)
         • (((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
            • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
                ▹ pr2 mz)
               • (rassociator (pr2 mx)
                    (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
                          (pr2 mz))
                     • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
                        • ((pr2 mx
                            ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf)
                                (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
                           • ((pr2 mx
                               ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                              • ((pr2 mx
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... ...)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ lassociator (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz) (pr2 mz))
• ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz))
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
      • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf
             ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
            • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
               • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg)
                  • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                         (pr1 mg))))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
• (((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • ((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
      • (((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
         • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
             ▹ pr2 mz)
            • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                 (pr2 mz)
               • ((pr2 mx
                   ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
                       (pr2 mz))
                  • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
                     • ((pr2 mx
                         ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf)
                             (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
                        • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                           • ((pr2 mx
                               ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx)
                                   (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
                              • (lassociator (pr2 mx)
                                   (pr2 mx)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • (μx ▹ ... · ...)))))))))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz))
• ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
      • ((pr1 mf
          ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
            • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
               • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                  • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                      (pr1 mg)))))))

                                (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
                           • (lassociator (pr2 mx)
                                (pr2 mx)
                                (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                              • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))))))) =
rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
• ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz))
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))

                     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                         (pr1 mg))))))))

mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,

?b =
((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)

mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
(((((((rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz) (pr2 mz)
       • (pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 mg ▹ pr2 mz)))
      • (pr1 mf
         ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)))
     • (pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg)))
    • (pr1 mf ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
   • (pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
 • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) = ?b

        
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
(((((((((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
       • rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg)
           (pr2 mz))
      • (pr1 mf
         ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)))
     • (pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg)))
    • (pr1 mf ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
   • (pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
 • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) = ?b

        
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• (rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
      • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf
             ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
            • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
               • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg)
                  • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                         (pr1 mg)))))))) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• (rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
      • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf
             ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
            • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
               • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg)
                  • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                         (pr1 mg)))))))) =
((pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
      • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
          ▹ pr2 mz)
         • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
              (pr2 mz)
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)
                    (pr2 mz))
               • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                          (pr1 mg))
                     • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                        • ((pr2 mx
                            ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx)
                                (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
                           • (lassociator (pr2 mx)
                                (pr2 mx)
                                (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                              • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
• ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
      • ((pr1 mf
          ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
            • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
               • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                  • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                      (pr1 mg))))))) =
(lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• (((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
      • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
           (pr2 mz)
         • ((pr2 mx
             ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
            • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
               • ((pr2 mx
                   ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                       (pr1 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                     • ((pr2 mx
                         ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx)
                             (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg))
                        • (lassociator (pr2 mx)
                             (pr2 mx)
                             (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                           • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))))))

              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =

(rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• (rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))

         • ((pr1 mf
             ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
            • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
               • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg)
                  • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                         (pr1 mg)))))))) =
((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)

                          (pr1 mg))
                     • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                          (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                        • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))))

f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,

• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)

      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)

B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
?b =
((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
      • ((pr2 mx
          ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
         • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg))
               • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                          (pr1 mg))
                     • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                          (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                        • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))))

   • ((pr1 mf ◃ rassociator (pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
      • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf
             ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))

mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,

        ▹ pr2 mz)

           (pr2 mz))

mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,

mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,

      • rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
          (pr1 mg · pr2 mz))

   • (pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
 • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
• rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) = ?b

      • ((pr2 mx
          ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))

                     • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                          (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                        • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
      • ((pr2 mx
          ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
         • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg))
               • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                          (pr1 mg))
                     • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                          (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                        • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))))) =
rassociator (pr1 mf · pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
• (rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz)
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
      • ((pr1 mf
          ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
            • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
               • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                  • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                      (pr1 mg)))))))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) ▹ pr2 mz)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
      • ((pr2 mx
          ◃ rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz))
         • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
                    (pr1 mg))
               • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
                  • ((pr2 mx
                      ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                          (pr1 mg))
                     • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                          (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                        • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz

• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
?b =
rassociator (pr1 mf · pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
• (rassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz)
   • ((pr1 mf ◃ (pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg))
      • ((pr1 mf
          ◃ lassociator (pr2 my) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • ((pr1 mf ◃ (μy ▹ pr1 mg))
            • (lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
               • ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)
                  • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                      (pr1 mg)))))))

mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f

B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,

   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)

         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =

       • (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg · pr2 mz))

    • (pr2 mx ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) = ?b

        
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
rassociator (pr1 mf · pr2 my) (pr1 mg) (pr2 mz)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg · pr2 mz)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg · pr2 mz)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr1 mf ◃ pr2 mg))
         • ((pr2 mx
             ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
            • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
               • ((pr2 mx
                   ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                       (pr1 mg))
                  • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                       (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                     • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))) =
?b

        apply idpath.

                     • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg)))))))) =

f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
μf: lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr2 my)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
(((((((pr1 mf · pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg)
      • (pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my · pr1 mg))
     • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg))
    • (pr2 mx ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)))
  • (pr2 mx ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)))
 • lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf · pr1 mg))
• (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg) = ?b

        
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz

• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my)
      • ((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf)
         • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
              (pr1 mf) • (μx ▹ pr1 mf))))) =
(pr1 mf ◃ μy) • pr2 mf
(pr1 mf · pr2 my ◃ pr2 mg)
• ((pr2 mf ▹ pr2 my · pr1 mg)
   • (rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg)
      • ((pr2 mx
          ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
         • ((pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg))
            • ((pr2 mx
                ◃ rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
                    (pr1 mg))
               • (lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx)
                    (pr1 mf · pr1 mg)
                  • (μx ▹ pr1 mf · pr1 mg))))))) = 
?b

        apply idpath.

μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
?b =
rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my · pr1 mg)
• ((pr2 mx ◃ lassociator (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg))
   • (pr2 mx ◃ (pr2 mf ▹ pr1 mg)))

      
B: bicat
mx, my, mz: ∑ x : B, B ⟦ x, x ⟧
mf: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 mx, pr1 my ⟧,
f · pr2 my ==> pr2 mx · f
mg: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 my, pr1 mz ⟧,
f · pr2 mz ==> pr2 my · f
μx: pr2 mx · pr2 mx ==> pr2 mx
μy: pr2 my · pr2 my ==> pr2 my
μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
lassociator (pr2 mx · pr1 mf) (pr2 my) (pr1 mg)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) (pr2 my) ▹ pr1 mg)
   • (((pr2 mx ◃ pr2 mf) ▹ pr1 mg)
      • ((lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
          ▹ pr1 mg)
         • ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf)
             ▹ pr1 mg)
            • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx · pr1 mf)
                (pr1 mg))))) = ?b

μz: pr2 mz · pr2 mz ==> pr2 mz
(lassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) ▹ pr1 mg)
• ((rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx) (pr1 mf) ▹ pr1 mg)
   • rassociator (pr2 mx) (pr2 mx · pr1 mf) (pr1 mg)) =
?t2

pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
p: lassociator (id₁ (pr1 ex)) (pr2 ex) (pr2 ex)

           (pr2 ex)
         • ((pr2 ex ◃ lunitor (pr2 ex))
            • ((pr2 ex ◃ rinvunitor (pr2 ex))
               • (lassociator (pr2 ex) (pr2 ex)
                    (id₁ (pr1 ex))
                  • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex)))))))) =

                  • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex)))))))) =

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
ex: end_bicat B
ef, eg: disp_cell_unit_bicat disp_add_mu_cat_data ex
pq: ef -->[ id₁ ex] eg × eg -->[ id₁ ex] ef
p: lassociator (id₁ (pr1 ex)) (pr2 ex) (pr2 ex)

   • ((rinvunitor (pr2 ex) ▹ pr2 ex)
      • (rassociator (pr2 ex) (id₁ (pr1 ex))
           (pr2 ex)

               • (lassociator (pr2 ex) (pr2 ex)
                    (id₁ (pr1 ex))
                  • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex)))))))) =

• (lunitor (pr2 ex) • rinvunitor (pr2 ex))
rinvunitor (pr2 ex · pr2 ex) • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex)) =
rinvunitor (pr2 ex · pr2 ex) • (ef ▹ id₁ (pr1 ex))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2 disp_add_mu

HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2 disp_add_mu

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_0 disp_add_mu
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_add_mu
 apply disp_univalent_2_1_disp_add_mu.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_mnd_data
    : disp_bicat B
    := sigma_bicat
         B
         _
         (disp_dirprod_bicat disp_add_unit disp_add_mu).

  
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd_data

  
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd_data

    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop (disp_end B)
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop
  (disp_dirprod_bicat disp_add_unit disp_add_mu)

    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop (disp_end B)
 apply disp_2cells_isaprop_end_bicat.
    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop
  (disp_dirprod_bicat disp_add_unit disp_add_mu)
 use disp_2cells_isaprop_prod ; apply disp_2cells_isaprop_cell_unit_bicat.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_locally_sym disp_mnd_data

  
B: bicat
disp_locally_sym disp_mnd_data

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
mg ==>[ τ ^-1] mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
pr1 mg • (pr1 mx ◃ τ ^-1) = (τ ^-1 ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr1 mτ: pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mg
pr1 mg • (pr1 mx ◃ τ ^-1) = (τ ^-1 ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr1 mτ: pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mg
pr1 mg = ((τ ^-1 ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mf) • (pr1 mx ◃ τ)

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr1 mτ: pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mg
pr1 mg = (τ ^-1 ▹ pr1 my) • (pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ))

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd_data x
my: disp_mnd_data y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr1 mτ: pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mg
(τ ▹ pr1 my) • pr1 mg = pr1 mf • (pr1 mx ◃ τ)

    exact (!p).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_locally_groupoid disp_mnd_data

disp_locally_groupoid disp_mnd_data

      exact HB.
    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_mnd_data
 apply disp_univalent_2_1_disp_mnd_data.
  Defined.

  Definition mnd_data
    : bicat
    := total_bicat disp_mnd_data.

  Definition is_mnd
             (m : mnd_data)
    : UU
    := let X := pr1 m in
       let f := pr12 m in
       let η := pr122 m in
       let μ := pr222 m in
       (linvunitor f • (η ▹ f) • μ = id2 f)
       ×
       (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η) • μ = id2 f)
       ×
       (rassociator _ _ _ • (f ◃ μ) • μ
        =
        (μ ▹ f) • μ).

  
B: bicat
m: mnd_data
isaprop (is_mnd m)

  
B: bicat
m: mnd_data
isaprop (is_mnd m)

    repeat (apply isapropdirprod) ; apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_mnd
    : disp_bicat B
    := sigma_bicat
         B
         _
         (disp_fullsubbicat _ is_mnd).

  
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd

  
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd

    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd_data
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop
  (disp_fullsubbicat mnd_data is_mnd)

    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop disp_mnd_data
 apply disp_2cells_isaprop_disp_mnd_data.
    
B: bicat
disp_2cells_isaprop
  (disp_fullsubbicat mnd_data is_mnd)
 apply disp_2cells_isaprop_fullsubbicat.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_locally_sym disp_mnd

  
B: bicat
disp_locally_sym disp_mnd

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
mg ==>[ τ ^-1] mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
pr11 mg • (pr11 mx ◃ τ ^-1) =
(τ ^-1 ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr11 mτ: pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mg
pr11 mg • (pr11 mx ◃ τ ^-1) =
(τ ^-1 ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr11 mτ: pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mg
pr11 mg =
((τ ^-1 ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mf) • (pr11 mx ◃ τ)

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr11 mτ: pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mg
pr11 mg =
(τ ^-1 ▹ pr11 my) • (pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ))

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
mx: disp_mnd x
my: disp_mnd y
mf: mx -->[ f] my
mg: mx -->[ g] my
mτ: mf ==>[ τ] mg
p:= pr11 mτ: pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ) = (τ ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mg
(τ ▹ pr11 my) • pr11 mg = pr11 mf • (pr11 mx ◃ τ)

    exact (!p).
  Qed.

∏ x : total_bicat disp_mnd_data, isaprop (is_mnd x)

x: total_bicat disp_mnd_data
isaprop (is_mnd x)

        repeat (use isapropdirprod) ; apply cellset_property.
  Defined.

  Definition mnd
    : bicat
    := total_bicat disp_mnd.

  (**
   2. The univalence
   *)
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 mnd

is_univalent_2_1 mnd

is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB.
    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 disp_mnd
 apply disp_univalent_2_1_disp_mnd.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat

is_univalent_2_0 mnd

 exact (pr1 HB).

disp_univalent_2_0 disp_mnd
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2 B

      exact HB.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2 mnd

HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2 mnd

HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2_0 mnd
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2_1 mnd

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2_0 mnd
 exact (is_univalent_2_0_mnd HB).
    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2 B
is_univalent_2_1 mnd
 exact (is_univalent_2_1_mnd (pr2 HB)).
  Defined.
End Monad.

(**
 3. Projections and constructions
 *)
Section MonadProjections.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (m : mnd B).

  Definition ob_of_mnd
    : B
    := pr1 m.

  Definition endo_of_mnd
    : ob_of_mnd --> ob_of_mnd
    := pr112 m.

  Definition unit_of_mnd
    : id₁ _ ==> endo_of_mnd
    := pr1 (pr212 m).

  Definition mult_of_mnd
    : endo_of_mnd · endo_of_mnd ==> endo_of_mnd
    := pr2 (pr212 m).

  Definition mnd_unit_left
    : linvunitor _ • (unit_of_mnd ▹ _) • mult_of_mnd = id2 _
    := pr122 m.

  Definition mnd_unit_right
    : rinvunitor _ • (_ ◃ unit_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd = id2 _
    := pr1 (pr222 m).

  Definition mnd_mult_assoc
    : rassociator _ _ _ • (_ ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd
      =
      (mult_of_mnd ▹ _) • mult_of_mnd
    := pr2 (pr222 m).

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
(endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd =
(lassociator endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd
 • (mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd)) • mult_of_mnd

  
B: bicat
m: mnd B
(endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd =
(lassociator endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd
 • (mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd)) • mult_of_mnd

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
(endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd =
lassociator endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd
• ((mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd)

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator endo_of_mnd
   endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd) ^-1
• ((endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd) =
(mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
rassociator endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd
• ((endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd) =
(mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd

    
B: bicat
m: mnd B
(rassociator endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd endo_of_mnd
 • (endo_of_mnd ◃ mult_of_mnd)) • mult_of_mnd =
(mult_of_mnd ▹ endo_of_mnd) • mult_of_mnd

    exact mnd_mult_assoc.
  Qed.
End MonadProjections.

Definition make_mnd_data
           {B : bicat}
           (x : B)
           (f : x --> x)
           (η : id₁ _ ==> f)
           (μ : f · f ==> f)
  : mnd_data B
  := x ,, (f ,, (η ,, μ)).

Definition make_mnd
           {B : bicat}
           (m : mnd_data B)
           (Hm : is_mnd B m)
  : mnd B
  := pr1 m ,, (pr2 m ,, Hm).

Section MonadMapProjections.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
          (f : m₁ --> m₂).

  Definition mor_of_mnd_mor
    : ob_of_mnd m₁ --> ob_of_mnd m₂
    := pr1 f.

  Definition mnd_mor_endo
    : mor_of_mnd_mor · endo_of_mnd m₂ ==> endo_of_mnd m₁ · mor_of_mnd_mor
    := pr112 f.

  Definition mnd_mor_unit
    : linvunitor _ • (unit_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
      =
      rinvunitor _ • (_ ◃ unit_of_mnd m₂) • mnd_mor_endo
    := pr1 (pr212 f).

  Definition mnd_mor_mu
    : lassociator _ _ _
      • (mnd_mor_endo ▹ _)
      • rassociator _ _ _
      • (_ ◃ mnd_mor_endo)
      • lassociator _ _ _
      • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
      =
      (_ ◃ mult_of_mnd m₂)
      • mnd_mor_endo
    := pr2 (pr212 f).
End MonadMapProjections.

Definition mnd_mor_data
           {B : bicat}
           (m₁ m₂ : mnd B)
  : UU
  := ∑ (f : ob_of_mnd m₁ --> ob_of_mnd m₂),
     f · endo_of_mnd m₂
     ==>
     endo_of_mnd m₁ · f.

Definition make_mnd_mor_data
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           (f : ob_of_mnd m₁ --> ob_of_mnd m₂)
           (f_e : f · endo_of_mnd m₂
                  ==>
                  endo_of_mnd m₁ · f)
  : mnd_mor_data m₁ m₂
  := f ,, f_e.

Definition mnd_mor_laws
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           (f : mnd_mor_data m₁ m₂)
  : UU
  := (linvunitor _ • (unit_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
      =
      rinvunitor _ • (_ ◃ unit_of_mnd m₂) • (pr2 f))
     ×
     (lassociator _ _ _
      • (pr2 f ▹ _)
      • rassociator _ _ _
      • (_ ◃ pr2 f)
      • lassociator _ _ _
      • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
      =
      (_ ◃ mult_of_mnd m₂)
      • pr2 f).

Definition make_mnd_mor_laws
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           (f : mnd_mor_data m₁ m₂)
           (fη : linvunitor _ • (unit_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
                 =
                 rinvunitor _ • (_ ◃ unit_of_mnd m₂) • pr2 f)
           (fμ : lassociator _ _ _
                 • (pr2 f ▹ _)
                 • rassociator _ _ _
                 • (_ ◃ pr2 f)
                 • lassociator _ _ _
                 • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ _)
                 =
                 (_ ◃ mult_of_mnd m₂)
                 • pr2 f)
  : mnd_mor_laws f
  := fη ,, fμ.

Definition make_mnd_mor
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           (f : mnd_mor_data m₁ m₂)
           (Hf : mnd_mor_laws f)
  : m₁ --> m₂
  := pr1 f ,, (pr2 f ,, Hf) ,, tt.

Section MonadCellProjections.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
          {f₁ f₂ : m₁ --> m₂}
          (τ : f₁ ==> f₂).

  Definition cell_of_mnd_cell
    : mor_of_mnd_mor f₁ ==> mor_of_mnd_mor f₂
    := pr1 τ.

  Definition mnd_cell_endo
    : mnd_mor_endo f₁ • (_ ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell)
      =
      (cell_of_mnd_cell ▹ _) • mnd_mor_endo f₂
    := pr112 τ.
End MonadCellProjections.

Definition mnd_cell_data
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           (f₁ f₂ : m₁ --> m₂)
  : UU
  := mor_of_mnd_mor f₁ ==> mor_of_mnd_mor f₂.

Definition is_mnd_cell
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           {f₁ f₂ : m₁ --> m₂}
           (τ : mnd_cell_data f₁ f₂)
  : UU
  := mnd_mor_endo f₁ • (_ ◃ τ)
     =
     (τ ▹ _) • mnd_mor_endo f₂.

Definition make_mnd_cell
           {B : bicat}
           {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
           {f₁ f₂ : m₁ --> m₂}
           (τ : mnd_cell_data f₁ f₂)
           (τ_e : is_mnd_cell τ)
  : f₁ ==> f₂
  := τ ,, ((τ_e ,, (tt ,, tt)) ,, tt).


B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
τ₁ = τ₂


B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
τ₁ = τ₂

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂, pr2 f₁ ==>[ x] pr2 f₂)
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
pr1 τ₁ = pr1 τ₂

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂, pr2 f₁ ==>[ x] pr2 f₂)

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
x: pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂
isaprop
  (∑
   _ : ∑
       _ : pr112 f₁ • (pr112 m₁ ◃ x) =
           (x ▹ pr112 m₂) • pr112 f₂, unit × unit,
   unit)

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
x: pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂
isaprop
  (∑
   _ : pr112 f₁ • (pr112 m₁ ◃ x) =
       (x ▹ pr112 m₂) • pr112 f₂, unit × unit)

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
x: pr1 f₁ ==> pr1 f₂
isaprop (unit × unit)

    apply isapropdirprod ; apply isapropunit.
  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ₁, τ₂: f₁ ==> f₂
p: cell_of_mnd_cell τ₁ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ₂
pr1 τ₁ = pr1 τ₂

  exact p.
Qed.

(**
 4. Invertible 2-cells
 *)
Section IsInvertibleMndCell.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {m₁ m₂ : mnd B}
          {f₁ f₂ : m₁ --> m₂}
          {τ : f₁ ==> f₂}
          (Hτ : is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)).

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
f₂ ==> f₁

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
f₂ ==> f₁

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
mnd_cell_data f₂ f₁
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
is_mnd_cell ?τ

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
mnd_cell_data f₂ f₁
 exact Hτ^-1.
    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
is_mnd_cell Hτ ^-1
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
         refine (!_) ;
         exact (mnd_cell_endo τ)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
is_invertible_2cell τ

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
is_invertible_2cell τ

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
f₂ ==> f₁
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
τ • ?φ = id₂ f₁
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
?φ • τ = id₂ f₂

    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
f₂ ==> f₁
 exact is_invertible_mnd_2cell_inverse.
    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
τ • is_invertible_mnd_2cell_inverse = id₂ f₁
 abstract
        (use eq_mnd_cell ; cbn ;
         apply vcomp_rinv).
    
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
is_invertible_mnd_2cell_inverse • τ = id₂ f₂
 abstract
        (use eq_mnd_cell ; cbn ;
         apply vcomp_linv).
  Defined.
End IsInvertibleMndCell.


B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)


B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
is_invertible_2cell (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
mor_of_mnd_mor f₂ ==> mor_of_mnd_mor f₁
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
cell_of_mnd_cell τ • ?φ = id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f₁)
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
?φ • cell_of_mnd_cell τ = id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f₂)

  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
mor_of_mnd_mor f₂ ==> mor_of_mnd_mor f₁
 exact (pr1 Hτ^-1).
  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
cell_of_mnd_cell τ • pr1 Hτ ^-1 =
id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f₁)
 abstract
      (exact (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_rinv Hτ))).
  
B: bicat
m₁, m₂: mnd B
f₁, f₂: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
Hτ: is_invertible_2cell τ
pr1 Hτ ^-1 • cell_of_mnd_cell τ =
id₂ (mor_of_mnd_mor f₂)
 abstract
      (exact (maponpaths pr1 (vcomp_linv Hτ))).
Defined.

(**
 5. Equivalences of monads
 *)
Section ToEquivalence.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x : B}
          {mx mx' : disp_mnd B x}
          (m₁ := x,, mx : mnd B)
          (m₂ := x,, mx' : mnd B)
          (Hl : mx -->[ id₁ x ] mx').

  Let l : m₁ --> m₂ := id₁ x ,, Hl.

  Context (Hγ : is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)).

  
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
mnd_mor_data m₂ m₁

  
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
mnd_mor_data m₂ m₁

    
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd m₂, ob_of_mnd m₁ ⟧
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
?f · endo_of_mnd m₁ ==> endo_of_mnd m₂ · ?f

    
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
B ⟦ ob_of_mnd m₂, ob_of_mnd m₁ ⟧
 exact (id₁ x).
    
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
id₁ x · endo_of_mnd m₁ ==> endo_of_mnd m₂ · id₁ x
 exact (lunitor _
             • rinvunitor _
             • Hγ^-1
             • lunitor _
             • rinvunitor _).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
mnd_mor_laws to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data

  
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
mnd_mor_laws to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data

    
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
linvunitor
  (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
• (unit_of_mnd m₂
   ▹ pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data) =
(rinvunitor
   (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
 • (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
    ◃ unit_of_mnd m₁))
• pr2 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
((((lassociator
      (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
      (endo_of_mnd m₁) (endo_of_mnd m₁)
    • (pr2 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
       ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂)
       (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
       (endo_of_mnd m₁))
  • (endo_of_mnd m₂
     ◃ pr2 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (endo_of_mnd m₂)
     (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data))
• (mult_of_mnd m₂
   ▹ pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data) =
(pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
 ◃ mult_of_mnd m₁)
• pr2 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data

    
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
linvunitor
  (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
• (unit_of_mnd m₂
   ▹ pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data) =
(rinvunitor
   (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data)
 • (pr1 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
    ◃ unit_of_mnd m₁))
• pr2 to_equivalence_mnd_help_right_adj_data
 
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
linvunitor (id₁ x) • (unit_of_mnd m₂ ▹ id₁ x) =
(rinvunitor (id₁ x) • (id₁ x ◃ unit_of_mnd m₁))

      • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)) • Hγ ^-1)
    • lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))
   • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))

     • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (endo_of_mnd m₂)
     (id₁ x)) • (mult_of_mnd m₂ ▹ id₁ x) =
(id₁ x ◃ mult_of_mnd m₁)
• ((((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)
      • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)) • Hγ ^-1)
    • lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))
   • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))

      
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
((((((((((((lassociator ... ... ... • (...))
           • (rinvunitor ... ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
          • (Hγ ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
         • (lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
        • (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)
           ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
       • rassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (id₁ x)
           (endo_of_mnd m₁))
      • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)))
     • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)))
    • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ Hγ ^-1))
   • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)))
  • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (endo_of_mnd m₂)
     (id₁ x)) • (mult_of_mnd m₂ ▹ id₁ x) =
(((((id₁ x ◃ mult_of_mnd m₁)
    • lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
   • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)) • Hγ ^-1)
 • lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))
• rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)

      
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (rinvunitor ... ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
          • rassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (id₁ x)
              (endo_of_mnd m₁))
         • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)))
        • (endo_of_mnd m₂
           ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)))
       • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ Hγ ^-1))
      • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)))
     • (endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)))
    • lassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (endo_of_mnd m₂)
        (id₁ x)) • (mult_of_mnd m₂ ▹ id₁ x))
  • runitor (endo_of_mnd m₂))
 • linvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)) • mnd_mor_endo l =
((id₁ x ◃ mult_of_mnd m₁) • lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
• rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)

      
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
lassociator (id₁ x) (endo_of_mnd m₁) (endo_of_mnd m₁)
• ((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • ((rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
      • ((Hγ ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
         • ((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
            • ((rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)
                ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
               • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (id₁ x)
                    (endo_of_mnd m₁)
                  • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                      ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
                     • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                         ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
                        • ((endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ Hγ ^-1)
                           • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                               ◃ lunitor
                                   (endo_of_mnd m₂))
                              • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                                  ◃ rinvunitor ...)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(id₁ x ◃ mult_of_mnd m₁)
• (lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))

m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
• (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ mult_of_mnd m₁) = ?b

        
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B

l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)

• (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ id₁ x)) = ?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x: B
mx, mx': disp_mnd B x
m₁:= x,, mx: mnd B
m₂:= x,, mx': mnd B
Hl: mx -->[ id₁ x] mx'
l:= id₁ x,, Hl: mnd B ⟦ m₁, m₂ ⟧
Hγ: is_invertible_2cell (mnd_mor_endo l)
lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
• (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ id₁ x)) =
lassociator (id₁ x) (endo_of_mnd m₁) (endo_of_mnd m₁)
• ((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • ((rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
      • ((Hγ ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
         • ((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
            • ((rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₂)
                ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
               • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd m₂) (id₁ x)
                    (endo_of_mnd m₁)
                  • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                      ◃ lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
                     • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                         ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))
                        • ((endo_of_mnd m₂ ◃ Hγ ^-1)
                           • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                               ◃ lunitor
                                   (endo_of_mnd m₂))
                              • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                                  ◃ rinvunitor ...)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...)))))))))))))

 • (lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁))
• (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁ · endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • (mult_of_mnd m₁ ▹ id₁ x)) =

• ((lunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
   • ((rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)
      • ((Hγ ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m₁)

                         ◃ rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd m₁))

                           • ((endo_of_mnd m₂
                               ◃ lunitor
